page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance powered by the KVM hypervisor and an x86_64 architecture. It features 8 dedicated physical cores from an Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 32.0 GB of system memory, which equates to 4.0 GB per core. The instance includes a bundled NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM, while local storage is not included. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate modest CPU and memory performance. The single-core stress-ng CPU performance is in the bottom 10% at 953.38, and multi-core performance falls in the bottom 25% at 4755.08. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is average at 340.09 GB/sec, but drops to a weak 37.18 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. Database operations and Redis SET throughput, which reaches 5.48 million operations per second, also place in the lower performance tiers, reflecting the older CPU architecture.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the inclusion of an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU makes this instance a budget-friendly entry point for GPU-accelerated tasks that do not require modern high-end accelerators. The hardware profile is best suited for lightweight GPU workloads such as video transcoding, low-concurrency inference, and basic machine learning tasks, rather than heavy database or high-throughput web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance designed for workloads requiring dedicated graphics processing. It is equipped with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, 32.0 GB of system memory, and a single NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark data shows modest CPU and memory performance, with stress-ng multi-core and large-block memory bandwidth falling into the lower percentiles, though small-block cached memory bandwidth remains average. Given the older Pascal-generation GPU and moderate CPU capabilities, this instance offers a cost-effective option for entry-level GPU tasks, such as video transcoding, lightweight inference, and basic parallel processing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM, designed for entry-level parallel processing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c8g1.2xlarge is an x86_64 GPU instance with 8 Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU.
tagline: An entry-level GPU-accelerated instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and an NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU for lightweight parallel workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
Bundled NVIDIA Pascal P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and no local storage
Best suited for lightweight GPU inference and video transcoding
